scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/types build && bun run --cwd packages/server build && bun run --cwd packages/frontend build
scripts.prepare: bun -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const git = spawnSync('git', ['rev-parse', '--is-inside-work-tree'], { stdio: 'ignore' }); if (git.status === 0) { const hook = spawnSync('lefthook', ['install'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(hook.status ?? 1); }"
